testcase.name: test_get_channels

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'channels': [{'channel_id': 'general', 'channel_type': 'general', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T01:15:32.992209+00:00', 'created_by': 'user_976038f616e3', ...}, {'channel_id': 'lead_lead_f851313645cd', 'channel_type': 'lead', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T01:17:19.824200+00:00', 'created_by': 'user_976038f616e3', ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_v21.py:227: in test_get_channels assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'channels': [{'channel_id': 'general', 'channel_type': 'general', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T01:15:32.992209+00:00', 'created_by': 'user_976038f616e3', ...}, {'channel_id': 'lead_lead_f851313645cd', 'channel_type': 'lead', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T01:17:19.824200+00:00', 'created_by': 'user_976038f616e3', ...}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_get_admin_users

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'count': 9, 'users': [{'created_at': '2026-02-06T15:29:23.552594+00:00', 'email': 'florian@unyted.world', 'last_login': '2026-02-22T11:45:51.287568+00:00', 'name': 'Florian', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-09T16:38:48.102149+00:00', 'email': 'luizcardo@gmail.com', 'name': 'Luiz Felipe Cardo', 'organization_id': None, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-10T04:03:40.523777+00:00', 'email': 'akalinezenix@gmail.com', 'name': 'Zen Akaline', 'organization_id': 'org_f1e0631b6306', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-20T15:49:09.611594+00:00', 'email': 'testuser@otherorg.com', 'name': 'Test User', 'organization_id': 'org_a54bfdea6cb4', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-20T15:53:21.367203+00:00', 'email': 'testuser155321@testorg.com', 'name': 'Test User 155321', 'organization_id': 'org_d920abc6b585', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-20T17:14:35.295953+00:00', 'email': 'test@example.com', 'name': 'Test User', 'organization_id': 'org_18fe2a1045cb', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_v21.py:271: in test_get_admin_users assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'count': 9, 'users': [{'created_at': '2026-02-06T15:29:23.552594+00:00', 'email': 'florian@unyted.world', 'last_login': '2026-02-22T11:45:51.287568+00:00', 'name': 'Florian', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-09T16:38:48.102149+00:00', 'email': 'luizcardo@gmail.com', 'name': 'Luiz Felipe Cardo', 'organization_id': None, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-10T04:03:40.523777+00:00', 'email': 'akalinezenix@gmail.com', 'name': 'Zen Akaline', 'organization_id': 'org_f1e0631b6306', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-20T15:49:09.611594+00:00', 'email': 'testuser@otherorg.com', 'name': 'Test User', 'organization_id': 'org_a54bfdea6cb4', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-20T15:53:21.367203+00:00', 'email': 'testuser155321@testorg.com', 'name': 'Test User 155321', 'organization_id': 'org_d920abc6b585', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-02-20T17:14:35.295953+00:00', 'email': 'test@example.com', 'name': 'Test User', 'organization_id': 'org_18fe2a1045cb', ...}, ...]}, list)
